name: Course Authoring
description: End-to-end workflow for authoring a multi-module AI-Hydro course: interview the user for audience and goals, propose a module breakdown with an explicit prerequisite graph, scaffold the files via the course_scaffold tool, then author each module's body.
author: AI-Hydro Team
when_to_use: When the user asks to build a course, design a curriculum, author teaching modules, create a learning path, or scaffold educational content for students.
